name: ambient.weird_item_reaction
description: Stage a small uncanny local event near a camp/NPC setup and watch for any ambient reaction path. The contract is packaged now, but it stays honestly blocked until harness staging stops depending on hand-piloted item-drop and NPC-assignment ritual.
blocked_reason: Current harness setup still lacks stable item-drop plus NPC staging helpers for a repeatable ambient-reaction probe.
required_helpers: assign_npc_to_camp(npc_selector, camp_selector) or an equivalent stable camp-staging helper
assign_npc_to_follower(npc_selector) or an equivalent stable nearby-NPC staging helper
